task_completion.description: Create the R script for cohort analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: An R script named 'cohort_analysis.R' is visible in a text editor, IDE (like RStudio), or listed in the file explorer under '/home/ga/RProjects/'.

task_completion.description: Implement logic to exclude missing customer IDs and non-positive quantities
task_completion.visual_evidence: R code visible in the script showing filtering conditions applied to the dataset, such as '!is.na(CustomerID)' and 'Quantity > 0'.

task_completion.description: Implement logic to calculate Cohort Month, Cohort Index, and Retention Rate
task_completion.visual_evidence: R code visible in the script showing grouping by customer to find the acquisition month, calculating the difference in months for the Cohort Index, and computing the percentage of retained users.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated retention rates to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'retention_rates.csv' is visible in the file explorer under '/home/ga/RProjects/output/', or the script shows an explicit command (e.g., write.csv) saving to this exact path.

task_completion.description: Generate a heatmap visualization of retention rates and save it as a PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'retention_heatmap.png' is visible in the file explorer under '/home/ga/RProjects/output/', an open image viewer/IDE plot pane shows the heatmap, or the script contains plotting and saving commands (e.g., ggplot with geom_tile and ggsave) targeting this path.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the R script to generate the outputs rather than just creating empty files
integrity.visual_evidence: Console output showing the execution of the script, or an IDE environment pane showing loaded dataframes and variables related to the analysis.

integrity.description: The agent computed the retention rates dynamically rather than hardcoding a pre-calculated matrix
integrity.visual_evidence: The script contains actual data manipulation and calculation logic (e.g., dplyr verbs, date math) rather than a hardcoded dataframe or matrix of retention values.

integrity.description: The agent used the specified dataset rather than downloading a different one or using dummy data
integrity.visual_evidence: The script explicitly loads the dataset from '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/online_retail.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the dataset at '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/online_retail.csv'. The final R script must be saved to '/home/ga/RProjects/cohort_analysis.R'. The output CSV must be saved to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/retention_rates.csv' and the heatmap plot to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/retention_heatmap.png'. The script must contain logic to filter out missing CustomerIDs and non-positive quantities.
